449 CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD CRNT_MDCTN_LST_RSDNT_CD Current Reconciled Medication List - Ptnt/Fam/Care CHAR 1 This column documents whether, at the time of discharge, the facility provided the patient’s current reconciled medication list to the patient, family and/or caregiver. 0 = No, current reconciled medication list not provided to the patient, family and/or caregiver 
1 = Yes, current reconciled medication list provided to the
